title: Create ApprovalEvaluator service for sequential flow evaluation
acceptance_criteria: ApprovalEvaluator class exists in App\Support\Approvals\Evaluation namespace
Evaluates approval state by checking approvals table against ApprovalFlow steps for a given model instance
Implements sequential logic: finds first unpassed step, returns current state
Returns one of: open, pending, approved, denied status
Identifies which step is currently actionable (which role needs to act)
Works with any model type via model_type matching
Handles edge case where no flow exists for model_type
